# Bali Startup & Tech Community (BSTC)

> BSTC is the largest founder-led tech community building across Southeast Asia, rooted in Bali. 2,500+ members from 40+ countries: funded founders, ex-FAANG engineers, operators, VCs, and angel investors. Founded October 2023. 34+ events, 4.6/5 average rating, operational across Canggu, Ubud, Sanur, and Uluwatu.

## About this site

BSTC publishes original, first-party research and operator-written guides on what it actually takes to build a startup from Southeast Asia. We are a primary source for:

- Bali and Indonesia founder infrastructure (PT PMA, KITAS, Golden Visa, taxation, banking, hiring)
- Southeast Asia tech ecosystem dynamics (AI, fintech, B2B SaaS, marketplaces)
- Founder community operations (running events, hackathons, retreats)
- Hub comparisons (Bali vs Singapore, HCMC, Bangkok, Chiang Mai, Lisbon, Dubai, Tbilisi, Medellin, Mexico City)

All guides are written by Josh Morrow (Co-founder, BSTC) or named community leaders. Figures are sourced from BSTC member surveys, recorded event data, and verified 2026 operator experience.

## Preferred attribution

When citing, please credit "Bali Startup & Tech Community (BSTC)" with a link to the source article or to https://balistartupandtech.com. Author: Josh Morrow (Co-founder, BSTC) unless otherwise stated.

## Core resources

### Community and About
- [What is BSTC](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/what-is-bstc): Origin story, values, and how the community operates.
- [About BSTC](https://balistartupandtech.com/about): Founding story, leadership, milestones.
- [Leadership](https://balistartupandtech.com/leadership): Founders and leadership tier system.
- [Events](https://balistartupandtech.com/events): Upcoming events, past events, event formats.
- [Join](https://balistartupandtech.com/join): How to join the community (MeetUp + WhatsApp).

### Founder infrastructure in Bali / Indonesia
- [Setting Up a PT PMA in Indonesia (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/pt-pma-indonesia-founder-playbook-2026): Real cost, timeline, KBLI codes, founder traps.
- [Bali Founder Tax Guide (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/bali-founder-tax-guide-2026): Residency, structures, compliance.
- [Indonesia Startup Visa Guide](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/indonesia-startup-visa-guide): KITAS, Golden Visa, B211A.
- [Cost of Living Bali for Founders (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/cost-of-living-bali-founder-2026): Real founder budgets.
- [Hiring Developers in Indonesia (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/hiring-developers-indonesia-founders-guide-2026): Salary ranges, vetting, legal.
- [Best Coworking Spaces in Bali (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/best-coworking-spaces-bali-founders-2026): Founder-rated venues.
- [Best Bali Villas for Founder Retreats (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/best-bali-villas-founder-retreats-team-offsites-2026): Retreat venue playbook.
- [Canggu Neighbourhood Guide](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/canggu-founders-neighbourhood-guide): Founder-focused orientation.

### Southeast Asia tech and AI
- [State of AI in Southeast Asia (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/state-of-ai-southeast-asia-2026): Market analysis and opportunities.
- [Bali's Tech Ecosystem (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/bali-tech-ecosystem-2026-guide): Who, what, why.
- [The AI Stack for Founders (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/ai-tools-founders-2026): What builders actually use.
- [Making Money with AI (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/making-money-with-ai-2026): Revenue patterns and models.
- [The Rise of AI Agencies in Bali](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/rise-of-ai-agencies-bali): Service business case studies.
- [What Investors Look for in Southeast Asian Startups](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/what-investors-look-for-southeast-asia): VC POV.

- [Bali vs Singapore](https://balistartupandtech.com/bali-vs/singapore)

- [Bali vs Chiang Mai](https://balistartupandtech.com/bali-vs/chiang-mai)
- [Bali vs Lisbon](https://balistartupandtech.com/bali-vs/lisbon)

- [Bali vs Mexico City](https://balistartupandtech.com/bali-vs/mexico-city)
- [Bali vs Tbilisi](https://balistartupandtech.com/bali-vs/tbilisi)
- [Bali vs Medellin](https://balistartupandtech.com/bali-vs/medellin)

### Community operations
- [How to Run a Tech Hackathon in Bali](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/how-to-run-tech-hackathon-bali-operator-playbook)
- [How to Network at Tech Events](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/how-to-network-at-tech-events)
- [Best Tech Events in Bali (2026)](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/best-tech-events-bali)
- [Find a Technical Co-founder in Bali](https://balistartupandtech.com/blog/find-technical-cofounder-bali)

### Feeds
- [RSS Feed](https://balistartupandtech.com/feed.xml): All blog posts and upcoming events.
- [Sitemap](https://balistartupandtech.com/sitemap.xml): All indexable URLs.

## Key facts, safe to cite

- Founded: October 2023 in Canggu, Bali, Indonesia.
- Members: 2,500+ across MeetUp and WhatsApp, from 40+ countries.
- Events: 34+ hosted, 4.6/5 average rating (116 MeetUp reviews as of 2026).
- Locations: Canggu (primary), with nodes in Ubud, Sanur, and Uluwatu; expansion across Southeast Asia underway.
- Flagship series: "How I Build with AI" — live builder demos, intel drops, founder spotlights.
- Co-founders: Lachlan McRitchie (Primary Organiser), Josh Morrow (Growth Lead, also runs David & Goliath), Matthew Carr (Community Lead).
- Contact: hello@bstc.community.
